hero.name: Marcelle Rocha
hero.description: I work in highly complex contexts: multiple user profiles, non-linear journeys, and decisions that balance user, business, and technology. My output is structure, clarity, and impact.

about.title: Hi, I’m Marcelle.
about.bio:
I’m a Senior Product Designer working on products with complex journeys, multiple user profiles, and challenges that require balancing behavior, business, and technology — from large-scale retail operations to SaaS, Martech, and EdTech platforms.

I work from discovery to delivery. I frame the problem before proposing a solution, run research with real users, and turn what I learn into product decisions backed by real evidence. I don’t just deliver design. I deliver the reasoning behind it.

Artificial intelligence is part of both the products I work on and my own process. It’s in this combination of strategy, experience, and technology that I build products people understand, trust, and adopt.
